notableEvents.label: Jose Altuve GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jose Altuve grounds into a double play, third baseman Kazuma Okamoto to second baseman Luis Urías to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Raynel Delgado out at 2nd. Jose Altuve out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jeremy Peña pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jeremy Peña walks. Jake Meyers to 3rd. Cam Smith to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. reaches on a throwing error by pitcher Nate Pearson. George Springer to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. reaches on a throwing error by pitcher Nate Pearson. George Springer to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Joey Loperfido pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Blue Jays challenged (catcher interference), call on the field was upheld: Joey Loperfido reaches on catcher interference by Brandon Valenzuela. Jose Altuve scores. Yordan Alvarez to 3rd. Isaac Paredes to 2nd. Joey Loperfido to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jeremy Peña pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jeremy Peña grounds out, second baseman Luis Urías to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

notableEvents.label: Joey Loperfido pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joey Loperfido homers (1) on a fly ball to right field. Jose Altuve scores. Yordan Alvarez scores.

notableEvents.label: 3 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game

notableEvents.label: Back-to-back-to-back HRs
notableEvents.detail: Three consecutive homers in one game
